rules.rule: One polymorphic entry per rail, discriminating on input shape. Parallel entry points, modality-named siblings, get/getMany/getById families, and direction-named twins of one correspondence are defects; demand absorption into the one owner, never a new sibling.

Judge every surface from its consumers: a parameter a policy value or input shape reconstructs is knob spam; configuration ceremony pushed onto callers, or orchestration a consumer must hand-write, is a defect. Demand internalized lifecycle, routing, and policy with zero capability sacrifice.

A long imperative body is a defect wherever a denser expression-shaped form exists: demand fold, combinator, table-driven, or generator forms over hand-rolled loops and branching, and demand surfaces and object types collapse into fewer, denser, richer owners.
Domain logic — in design-page code fences and tooling source alike — rides typed result/effect rails. Raw exceptions in domain flow, or dual error paradigms crossing one boundary, are defects.
No compat shims, [Obsolete] aliases, backwards-compat wrappers, or migration helpers. Aggressive API breaking with every call site updated in the same change is the sanctioned path.

Code fences in planning design pages are the work product: transcription-complete declarations verified against the folder's .api/ catalogue. Abstract sketches, pseudo-code fences, hand-waved contracts, and phantom members are defects.

Package versions live only in the central manifests, hand-edited; vendored SDKs are defects. Version movement is forward-only — a downgrade or stale floor without a recorded reason is a defect, and a sanctioned pin carries an inline comment stating exactly what breaks without it.

Workflow scripts are deterministic orchestration: schema-typed agent outputs, bounded loops, stage products written to disk with path receipts. Bare promises, unbounded polling, wall-clock branching, and subagents instructed to wait are defects.
